# Research - 2026-07-12

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> Sunday, `date -u +%u` = 7. Weekly repos (claude-code, aider) skipped;
> monthly (1st Mon) set already ran 2026-07-06, next 2026-08-03. Daily:
> kilocode 12 commits (incl. shutdown-safety `e0bfed3`), cline 25 commits
> (mostly VS Code), sst/opencode 60+ commits (mostly web-stats / desktop).
> One NEW portable pattern (SIGINT child-teardown), one NEW polish item
> (idle cwd in StatusBar). Labeling gap now WORSE: five open enhancement
> issues (#923/#924/#926/#928/#930) still lack `auto-implement` — the
> queue is empty.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 (~2h, NEW)**: SIGINT in `src/cli/interactive.ts:2414-2426` calls
  `process.exit(0)` without killing children tracked in
  `src/tool/tools/background-process.ts` (`runningProcesses` map).
  Children are `spawn(..., { detached: true })` + `child.unref()` at
  `background-process.ts:85-117`, so they survive parent exit. Kilocode
  landed the equivalent fix `e0bfed3` (2026-07-10) — SIGTERM then SIGKILL
  escalation — plus a `KILO_PARENT_PID` parent-death watchdog. Alexi has
  neither.
- **#2 (~1h, NEW)**: Port opencode `#36457` (`34e5809`, 2026-07-11) —
  show cwd in the idle StatusBar. Our `StatusBar`
  (`src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:52-171`) has no cwd segment;
  long worktree sessions lose track of which tree is being written.
  Upstream is a single-file +11 diff.
- **#3 (~5m, RE-SURFACED third cycle)**: `gh issue edit 923 924 926 928
  930 --add-label auto-implement` unblocks Agent 3. Today
  `gh issue list --label auto-implement --state open` returns `[]` while
  five items sit ready. #925 (agent_switch) shipped/closed once labeled —
  the wiring works.
- **Not portable this cycle**: cline `2d2c669` (reload provider on model
  switch) — our `getProviderForModel` at `src/providers/index.ts:58`
  already builds a fresh provider per call, no cache. cline `10cb9bd`
  (compaction budget) overlaps existing #901. opencode `251177d` (worker
  env forwarding) — `task.ts` uses in-process subagents, no spawn.
- **Rotation**: kilocode/cline/opencode all 0 dryness (active). No
  demotions. Weekly (claude-code, aider) resumes 2026-07-13.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. SIGINT teardown for tracked background processes (tool, ~2h)

- **What**: Add `process.on('SIGINT')` + `SIGTERM` handlers in
  `src/cli/program.ts` (one-shot) and `src/cli/interactive.ts:2414`
  (alongside existing abort branch) that iterate `runningProcesses` from
  `background-process.ts`, send `SIGTERM`, wait ~1s, escalate to
  `SIGKILL`. Export `killAllTracked(): Promise<void>` from
  `background-process.ts`. Test: `spawn('sleep 30')`, register, fire,
  assert `process.kill(pid, 0)` throws `ESRCH` within 2s.
- **Why**: `background-process.ts:85-89` uses `detached: true` +
  `unref()`. Ctrl-C'ing `alexi` mid-session with `npm run dev` running
  leaves the dev server holding the port. Kilocode acknowledged the same
  class of bug — SIGTERM alone insufficient for a trapping subprocess.
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode `e0bfed3` "fix: harden Kilo CLI shutdown
  and prevent orphaned processes" (2026-07-10T17:15:11Z), primary file
  `KiloBackendCliManager.kt` +59/-13 plus `KiloBackendCliKillTest.kt`
  +21/-4.
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 2. Show working directory in idle StatusBar (command, ~1h)

- **What**: Add a `cwd` segment to `StatusBarProps` in
  `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:8-25`, rendering
  `path.basename(process.cwd())` (or `~/...` under `$HOME`) when
  `isStreaming === false && leaderActive === false`. Reuse
  `src/cli/tui/utils/pathFormat.ts:10`. Feed from `ChatPage.tsx:122` and
  `LogsPage.tsx:108`. Test: render with `isStreaming=false`, assert
  segment; with `true`, assert omitted (avoid streaming jitter).
- **Why**: We already truncate model names to 18 chars because segment
  space is tight; idle-only is the right slot. Agent Manager worktrees
  under `~/.alexi/worktrees/` make cwd non-obvious.
- **Source**: sst/opencode `34e5809` "feat(tui): show idle session
  directory" (2026-07-11T20:31:57Z), PR #36457, single-file diff
  `packages/tui/src/component/prompt/index.tsx` +11/-0.
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~1h).

#### 3. Label the five ready-to-go enhancement issues (config, ~5m)

- **What**: `gh issue edit 923 924 926 928 930 --add-label auto-implement`.
  Optionally close #911 and #916 as duplicates of #924 (same lenient
  JSON.parse request filed three times). No code change.
- **Why**: `auto-implement.yml` filters on that label; open matches = 0
  today, five ready items excluded. Third brief in a row surfacing this;
  meta-issue #930 filed for #923 alone was itself never actioned.
- **Source**: `.github/research/2026-07-04-research.md`, `-07-05`,
  `-07-06`; `gh issue list --state open --json labels`.
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (<1h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #3 first (5 min, unblocks Agent 3 for the week). Then #1
   (real reliability fix). Then #2 (polish, popular upstream feature).
2. **Escalation**: if #3 is not actioned in 48h, ping Agent 6 (prompt
   optimizer). The label filter in `auto-implement.yml` may need widening
   to include `enhancement` if labeling keeps getting skipped.
3. **Rotation**: no demotions. Reassess Monday 2026-07-13 with weekly set.
